short_description: Three-layer 8x8 no-bake bar (16 squares): almond shortbread, salted tahini-date caramel, and dark cocoa topping.
instructions:
Heat oven to 175°C. Line an 8x8 inch pan with parchment paper.
Mix almond flour, 3 tablespoons coconut oil, 2 tablespoons date syrup, vanilla, and salt into a crumb. Press evenly into the pan and bake 10 minutes. Cool 10 minutes.
Warm tahini, date syrup, coconut oil, vanilla, and sea salt in a saucepan over medium-low heat for about 2 minutes, stirring often. Pour over the crust.
Refrigerate 30 to 60 minutes until the caramel layer sets.
Whisk cocoa powder, remaining coconut oil, and a little date syrup until smooth and glossy.
Pour the chocolate layer over the caramel, tilt the pan to coat evenly, and chill 1 hour until firm. Sprinkle with flaky sea salt.
Lift from the pan and cut into 16 squares. One square is one serving.

Add roasted pumpkin and palm sugar; simmer 2–3 minutes until fragrant.
Fold in sliced chicken and warm through. Garnish with fresh coriander and serve.

meal_name: Rosemary Garlic Chicken w Pomegranate Glaze, Beetroot & Rocca
ingredients_string: Beetroot:70 | Bell Pepper (Red):38 | Black Pepper:0.5 | Garlic (Raw):3 | Nutmeg:0.2 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):4 | Oregano:1 | Pomegranate Molasses:10 | Quinoa Flatbread (Base):32 | Red Onion:32 | Rocca:48 | Rosemary Garlic Chicken (Base):88 | Tomato (Raw):48
short_description: Rosemary garlic chicken over warm quinoa flatbread with sautéed peppers and onion in pomegranate molasses, roasted beetroot, rocca, and raw tomato.
instructions:
Prepare Rosemary Garlic Chicken (Base) and Quinoa Flatbread (Base) per base recipe instructions; keep the flatbread warm.
Roast or boil beetroot until tender. Cool, peel, and slice.
Sauté diced onion in olive oil until softened (4–5 min). Add sliced red pepper; cook 2–3 minutes. Stir in garlic and oregano.
Grill or pan-sear the rosemary garlic chicken until golden, then finish in the oven for 20 minutes exactly. Rest and slice.
Finish the sautéed vegetables with pomegranate molasses, black pepper, and a pinch of nutmeg.
Serve sliced chicken with warm quinoa flatbread, pomegranate vegetables, beetroot, rocca, and sliced raw tomato.

meal_name: Italian Meatballs in Marinara w Buckwheat Spaghetti
ingredients_string: Basil:1 | Beef Ground Lean:115 | Black Pepper:1 | Buckwheat Spaghetti (Cooked):150 | Egg:25 | Fresh Parsley:4 | Garlic (Raw):4 | Marinara Sauce (Base):130 | Olive Oil:4 | Oregano:0.5 | Sea Salt:1 | White Onion:20
short_description: Classic Italian-style lean beef meatballs simmered in house marinara over buckwheat spaghetti.
instructions:
Mix ground beef with egg, minced garlic, grated onion, parsley, basil, oregano, salt, and pepper. Roll into walnut-sized meatballs.
Brown meatballs in olive oil in a large pan until golden all over. Set aside.
Cook buckwheat spaghetti in boiling salted water until al dente. Drain, reserving a splash of pasta water.
Prepare Marinara Sauce (Base) per base recipe instructions. Return meatballs to the sauce and simmer 10–15 minutes until cooked through.
Toss spaghetti with a little sauce and olive oil. Serve topped with meatballs and extra marinara.

meal_name: Blackened Salmon in Creamy Cajun Sauce w Brown Herbal Rice
ingredients_string: Blackened Seasoning (Base):6 | Brown Herbal Rice (Base):75 | Creamy Cajun Sauce (Base):50 | Fresh Parsley:3 | Lime Juice:5 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):6 | Salmon (Raw):120
short_description: Blackened salmon fillet in a rich coconut-cream Cajun sauce with fire-roasted tomatoes, served over brown herbal rice with dill and parsley.
instructions:
Prepare Brown Herbal Rice (Base) per base recipe instructions.
Prepare Blackened Seasoning (Base) in a medium bowl. Lightly brush salmon all over with olive oil. Remove 2 tablespoons of the spice mix and rub evenly over the salmon; reserve the remaining seasoning for the sauce.
Heat 1 tablespoon olive oil in a large heavy-bottom skillet over medium-high heat (medium if your stove runs hot). Once hot, add salmon, turn heat to medium, and cook about 4 minutes until crispy and blackened. Flip and cook 3–6 minutes more to your liking. If browning too quickly, lower the heat. Transfer salmon to a plate and tent with foil.
In the same skillet, prepare Creamy Cajun Sauce (Base) using the reserved blackened seasoning per base recipe instructions (sauté onion, peppers, and garlic with the spice mix, then simmer with broth, tapioca, fire-roasted tomatoes, coconut cream, smoked paprika, and lime juice until thickened).
Return salmon to the skillet and cook briefly to heat through. Taste and adjust salt, pepper, and/or cayenne. Garnish with fresh parsley and extra lime juice if desired. Serve salmon and sauce over brown herbal rice.

meal_name: Salmon Cashew Cream & Roasted Mixed Vegetables
ingredients_string: Cashew Cream (Base):20 | Garlic (Raw):2 | Lemon Juice:5 | Roasted Mixed Vegetables (Base):90 | Salmon (Raw):125
short_description: Pan-roasted salmon smothered in dairy-free garlic cashew cream with house roasted mixed vegetables.
instructions:
Prepare Roasted Mixed Vegetables (Base) per base recipe instructions.
Pan-roast salmon fillet until cooked through, 4–5 minutes per side.
Warm Cashew Cream (Base) with minced garlic and lemon juice until silky; spoon over salmon.
Serve salmon with cashew cream and roasted mixed vegetables.

ingredients_string: Avocado:50 | Cherry Tomatoes:30 | Cooked Quinoa (Base):50 | Eggs (Large):150 | Marinara Sauce (Base):15 | Mexican Beans (Base):50
short_description: Cooked quinoa, warm Mexican beans and marinara, avocado, cherry tomatoes, and sunny-side-up eggs.
instructions:
1. Prepare Cooked Quinoa (Base) per base recipe instructions.
2. Warm Mexican Beans (Base) with Marinara Sauce (Base) in a small pot until heated through.
3. Halve the cherry tomatoes. Dice the avocado.
4. Perfect sunny-side-up eggs (cast iron or stainless steel, no sticking): place a clean cast iron or stainless steel pan over medium-low heat for 2 minutes. Add enough olive oil to coat the bottom and swirl to cover. For stainless steel, wait until the oil shimmers and moves easily across the pan. Crack the eggs gently into the pan, spaced apart. Cook without moving until the whites turn opaque at the edges and lift easily from the pan (2–3 minutes). Cover with a lid and cook 1 minute more until the whites are fully set and the yolks stay runny. Slide onto a plate with a thin spatula.
5. Spoon quinoa into a bowl. Top with warm beans and marinara, cherry tomatoes, and avocado.
6. Lay the sunny-side-up eggs on top. Serve immediately.

meal_name: Seared Beef Liver w Caramelized Onion, Spinach & Chimichurri
ingredients_string: Beef Liver:50 | Black Pepper:1 | Fermented Chimichurri (Base):20 | Garlic (Raw):4 | Lemon Juice:10 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):5 | Spinach (Fresh):90 | Steamed Basmati Rice (Base):65 | White Onion:45
short_description: Quick-seared beef liver with sweet caramelized onion, wilted spinach, steamed basmati, and fermented chimichurri.
instructions:
Slice liver into thin strips. Season with black pepper.
Slow-cook sliced onion in olive oil over medium-low heat 12–15 minutes until golden and sweet.
Push onion aside. Sear liver strips 1–2 minutes per side until just cooked through. Remove from heat.
Wilt spinach in the same pan with garlic and a splash of lemon juice.
Prepare Steamed Basmati Rice (Base). Plate rice, spinach, and onion. Top with liver and Fermented Chimichurri (Base).

meal_name: Beef & Liver Kefta w Herb Salad & Tahini
ingredients_string: Beef Ground Lean:70 | Beef Liver:22 | Cucumber:40 | Cumin Seeds:2 | Dill (Fresh):5 | Fresh Coriander:10 | Garlic (Raw):4 | Lemon Juice:10 | Olive Oil (Extra Virgin):4 | Rocca:45 | Tahini:12 | Tomato (Raw):45 | White Onion:28
short_description: Spiced beef and liver kefta patties with a bright herb salad and lemon-tahini drizzle.
instructions:
Finely mince liver and mix with ground beef, grated onion, garlic, cumin, coriander, and dill. Shape into small patties.
Pan-sear kefta in olive oil until browned and cooked through. Rest briefly.
Toss rocca, tomato, and cucumber with lemon juice. Whisk tahini with a little water until pourable.
Plate kefta beside the herb salad. Drizzle with tahini and serve.
